mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_file (file_name, file_path, file_size, file_type, file_ext, file_category, upload_by, upload_time, create_by, create_time, deleted, remark) VALUES (#{fileName}, #{filePath}, #{fileSize}, #{fileType}, #{fileExt}, #{fileCategory}, #{uploadBy}, #{uploadTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, 0, #{remark})
mapper.update:
UPDATE sys_file
file_name = #{fileName}, file_category = #{fileCategory}, update_by = #{updateBy}, remark = #{remark}, update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_file SET deleted = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_file WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_file f WHERE f.deleted = 0 ORDER BY f.upload_time DESC
SELECT * FROM sys_file f WHERE f.deleted = 0 ORDER BY f.upload_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_file f WHERE f.deleted = 0

SELECT * FROM sys_file f
f.deleted = 0
AND f.file_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{fileName}, '%')
AND f.file_category = #{fileCategory}
ORDER BY f.upload_time DESC
